title: Performaddox
description: A simple modpack focused on performance mods. No more lag!
body:
![Banner](https://i.imgur.com/r6ez89o.png 'Banner')

### What is Performaddox?

Performaddox is a simple yet useful modpack for people that needs some FPS. You might have an old pc, or maybe you want to play All The Mods but your pc cannot run the modpack, I'm not here to judge you, but to give you solutions. In this modpack you will find mods that helps with your performance so you can play Minecraft.

Go take a look, download the pack and enjoy!

### Installation

- Download Modrinth App.
- Search Performaddox in the Modpack section.
- Wait for installation.
- Enjoy!

If you want to pick what mods you use, just disable the ones you don't want in the green button on your Modrinth App ^^

### Modlist
Note: Some versions may vary in the mod selection due to mods not being updated/Mojang fixing issues.

- Cull Leaves.
- Entity Culling.
- FPS Reducer.
- Inmeddiately Fast.
- Memory Leak Fix.
- Oculus.
- Rubidium.
- Starlight.

### It's me, hi

All my social media can be found here: [Danymaddox](https://linktr.ee/Danymaddox).

And if you like to add more gold, follow me here on [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/user/Danymaddox) and take a look, there's more comming soon.

![BisectHostingBanner](https://i.imgur.com/a5blp93.png)
